experiments: c003 (Faraday onset, two-route 0.0013%, k-alias trap recorded)
provenance.honesty: all values = clean idealized physics; floors listed per section; real-world reads differ in the stated directions

fluid_water.response: subharmonic f/2 — measured first instability at ALL 48 conditions (10-2000 Hz)

threshold_curve_h20mm.note: single damping model; depth/BL measured irrelevant (kh>>1)

app_default_440hz.finding: threshold 32.8 m/s^2 = displacement amplitude 4.29 um at 440 Hz — EASILY reached by real speakers/shakers (lab exciters ~6 g routine, literature). The silence at defaults is caused by the app's arbitrary 30 m/s^2 slider cap, NOT by physics or hardware. CORRECTION 2026-07-03: earlier 'hardware-unreachable' framing was wrong (caught by ueki's analog instinct).

notes: clean-surface values; real tap water reads HIGHER (surfactant damping, established direction)
linear onset only; pattern type (stripes/squares/hexagons) is nonlinear and out of scope
band_ms2 = spread between two damping submodels (honest uncertainty); collapses above ~57 Hz
no sidewalls/meniscus: finite dishes discretize response and raise thresholds
fluid_water.displacement_insight: displacement threshold is nearly FLAT across the band: ~6.5 um (10 Hz) -> 2.6 um (2 kHz), scaling f^(-1/3). Clean water wants 'a few microns of vertical shake' at any frequency.

lambda_check.published: water Faraday experiments, drive 30-60 Hz: lambda ~ 8-14 mm (arXiv:1403.7880)

hardware_scale.note: standard lab electromagnetic exciters reach ~6 g (Langmuir 2020 Faraday-tension paper); speakers reach um displacements trivially at 100s of Hz

meniscus.note: meniscus/wall raises & distorts onset; small containers show discrete eigenmodes along the stability curve (Eur.Phys.J. meniscus-threshold paper). Real dishes are never perfectly still below threshold — weak wall ripples at f exist at any amplitude.
meniscus.consequence: our infinite-plane 'honest silence' is TOO silent vs a real dish; caption fix required

strong_drive.note: near wave-breaking, droplets are ejected from wave peaks (literature); ultrasonic atomization is this instability's extreme relative

robustness_temperature.note: threshold tracks viscosity exactly as weak-damping theory (<1% dev); lambda moves <0.6%

gamma_window.meaning: Gamma = peak plate accel / g; below ~1 nothing detaches (measured control)

sand_on_plate.formation_note: to ~3x ring enrichment at Gamma=80, mode (0,1) 152 Hz — config-specific measurement

robustness_e_beta.note: ring enrichment @9s, all node-ward; rate varies sensibly with dissipation

lag_law.music_mode_consequence: sand pattern follows the STRONGEST LOW-frequency content; high notes barely move sand at equal acceleration
lag_law.open_question: if real plates re-form high modes faster, that is evidence of channels outside this model (air, etc.) - folded into hand-experiment #1

circular_free_steel_24cm.source: c001 two-route validated (1.6e-10); external Leissa check pending (YELLOW)
circular_free_steel_24cm.note: center drive reaches ONLY 4 of 32 audible modes (all rings)

damping_zeta.status: UNMEASURED — c001 assumed 0.002, app config has 0.005; hand-experiment #1 ringdown will measure; until then tag PLACEHOLDER

plate_modal_shapes.plate: circular free steel a=0.12m h=1mm nu=0.30 (c001, two-route 1.6e-10)
plate_modal_shapes.decision: DEFAULT PLATE = CIRCLE (phase 1, staged; square after c001b) — ueki 2026-07-03
plate_modal_shapes.formula: forced response, drive at (r0,theta0): amp_mn = R_mn(r0/a) / sqrt((f_mn^2-f^2)^2 + (2*zeta*f_mn*f)^2); field(r,theta) = sum amp_mn * R_mn(r/a) * cos(m*(theta-theta0))

zeta.status: PLACEHOLDER — unmeasured; hand-exp #1 ringdown will measure

plate_modal_shapes.amplitude_note: shapes normalized max|R|=1; field is relative (display-normalized); absolute amplitude needs modal-mass calibration (later)

capillary_regime.result: SQUARE lattice earned (top-2 pair 90.0deg, 64% share, f/2 preserved)

mixed_regime.result_snapshot: NON-square: leading pair at 73.8deg; modes near theta_r=61deg actively suppressed (resonance mechanism visible); convergence ONGOING at 2140 periods
mixed_regime.tier: measured snapshot / frontier; display as 未確定 until repo CI converges

pattern_shape.display_rule: show only what the computation actually selected; growing process incl. domain competition is shown (approved)

rendering_oracle.validation: near-axial crossing extrapolation: dev 0.0% (A=20um), 0.0% (A=200um) vs nR/(n-1); negative spherical aberration measured (soft deep glow); 3 metric dead-ends recorded
rendering_oracle.purpose: ground-truth intensity profiles for the Metal caustics shader tests
